title: Packet 001 Through Packet 005 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
objective: Publish the local Olares Dev Residency Packet 001 through Packet 005 authority set through the parent-root boundary, push `clean-main`, and fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` non-destructively so the host mirror carries the governed cutover, toolchain, and validation evidence before any later client-only or feature-delivery decision depends on it.

Olares Dev Residency Packet 002 host residency and blocked toolchain validation authority
Olares Dev Residency Packet 003 toolchain availability decision authority
Olares Dev Residency Packet 004 materialization authority decision

developer-host cutover milestone, technical plan, checklist, and operator prompt artifacts
routing and roadmap updates required to record the closeout and next step
excluded_scope: unrelated authority drift outside the Dev Residency 001 through 007 publication lane
validation_steps: Reconfirm local `clean-main` and `origin/clean-main` baseline before staging.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at the expected pre-publication commit before host resync.
Observe `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` commit and status count only.
Stage only the bounded authority scope listed in this packet.
Run JSON parse checks for Packet 001 through Packet 007 JSON.
Run `git diff --cached --check` and inspect staged path scope.
Confirm no app source, package, lockfile, runtime, or service paths are staged except docs/authority surfaces explicitly listed.
Commit and push only if staged scope is exact.
Fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` non-destructively to the published commit and confirm status count 0.
explicit_no_go_items: new toolchain materialization or validation retry
sql_permission_note: Authority publication only. This packet authorizes no database writes, source/test execution, package mutation, lockfile mutation, runtime mutation, service mutation, old-clone mutation, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, or clean.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as the bounded publication and host-mirror resync successor after Packet 005 materialized the minimum host toolchain and proved the admitted validation commands. Packet 006 published the bounded Dev Residency Packet 001 through Packet 005 authority set, the Packet 006 closeout authority, the authored Packet 007 next-step decision authority, and the required routing and roadmap updates through the parent-root boundary, then fast-forwarded `/home/olares/code/apex` non-destructively while preserving the old clone as observe-only and keeping source/test execution, new toolchain materialization, feature delivery, public ingress change, hosting transition, runtime/service mutation, package/lockfile mutation, remote rewrite, rollback, force, reset, and clean closed.
next_action: Execute `Olares Dev Residency 007 - Post-006 Client-Only Laptop Posture Opening Decision` as the next bounded decision surface before any resumed feature-delivery readiness gate is considered.
